entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The nutrient status of the soil affecting crop productivity

entities.description: A participatory research design linking researcher-managed trials with farmer-managed trials

entities.description: Crops integrated into maize-based systems to improve soil productivity and yield

entities.name: INORGANIC FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical nutrients applied to soil to increase crop yields

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of crop production per unit area

entities.name: WEED SUPPRESSION
entities.description: A secondary benefit of certain soil fertility technologies

entities.name: SOIL MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing soil to improve productivity and fertility

entities.name: FARMER AND RESEARCHER PARTNERSHIPS
entities.description: Collaborative relationships between farmers and scientists to develop agricultural technologies
